"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Rikka.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Rikka.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Rikka.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -shared -o Rikka.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libRikka.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Rikka.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\Rikka.dir\linkLibs.rsp
